name: Raisin Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle 2 tbsp of the oats over the bottom of a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan and set aside.
2. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in sugar.
3. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
4. Stir together flour, remaining oats, raisins, baking soda, and salt; blend into the chocolate mixture.
5. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees F for about 30 minutes.
7. Cool, then cut into bars.
Makes 24 brownies.
